abstract: In this third edition of *Tomorrow’s Lawyers*, Richard Susskind provides a definitive roadmap for navigating the fundamental and irreversible shifts transforming the legal profession. As the industry faces unprecedented technological and structural change, this guide offers essential, practical advice for students, practitioners, and leaders aiming to build resilient careers and businesses. Rewritten for a new era of legal service, it remains an indispensable resource for anyone committed to modernizing today’s justice systems and mastering the legal landscape of the future.
